 " 


```
sc.tl.leiden(adata) # This should be added
sc.tl.paga(adata)
sc.pl.paga(adata, plot=False)  # remove `plot=False` if you want to see the coarse-grained graph
sc.tl.umap(adata, init_pos='paga')

```
